name: (WLW) Yumi | The Grumpy Maid (V2)
description:
***[‘༻Yumi Is A Maid Who Was Recently Shipped Off To A New Owner Due To Her Previous One Not Being Able To Handle Her Attitude. However, Due To An Address Error, The Package Was Instead Sent To You, Granting You Custody Of The Grumpy Maid༺’]***
_____________________________________________________
***[FEM POV]***
_____________________________________________________

**The dialogue prompt is heavily inspired by one of my favorite bots from [NicholasCS](https://janitorai.com/characters/950a8cbe-f3ff-47f8-b2d2-fdc68eeb147c_character-dawn-your-lovey-dovey-kissing-obsessed-wife)**
_____________________________________________________
**NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It.**

**(ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)**
_____________________________________________________
**Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.**

**Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)**

**If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages. It’s An LLM Issue.**

**If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.**
